issues.description: Missing conditional logic. Effect requires a cost (return 1+ DON!! from field to deck) before the action executes. DSL should use a Condition to gate the action, or represent this as a cost-action pair. Current DSL unconditionally gives DON!!

Action type 'GiveDon' is incomplete. The effect should search/add a DON!! from deck and set it active, not just give DON!!. Current action does not capture the 'add from deck' or 'set as active' mechanics
No representation of the optional ('You may') nature or the variable cost (1 or more DON!!). The DSL should indicate optionality and the cost structure

actions.note: Cost: return 1+ DON!! from field to DON!! deck; Add up to 1 DON!! and set as active
